failedAssertions.reason: WCAG AA contrast requirement was not met in validation evidence (light hint text 2.85:1, light secondary button text 1.61:1, dark hint text 4.38:1).
400 and 502 error rendering paths were verified, but a 404 UI error rendering case could not be reproduced during rerun attempts (long-running/timed-out unpriceable-token probes).

appliedUpdates.description: Added guidance that quote-error probes for 404 coverage require accepting the unknown-token warning modal (Continue) before the request is dispatched.

frictions.description: Browser session intermittently produced about:blank tabs/tab-close races during automation.
frictions.resolution: Recovered by re-snapshotting and continuing in active localhost tab.

frictions.description: Unknown-token quote testing requires acknowledging the warning modal before request dispatch.
frictions.resolution: Clicked Continue in the warning modal before submitting assertion probes.

blockers.description: Could not obtain a UI 404 quote-error render within rerun window; unpriceable-token attempts remained long-running/timed out.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried with alternate token combinations, explicit modal continue, extended waits, and direct localhost curl probes with timeouts.
